forced_counterparty: Retail theme chasers and benchmark/redemption-constrained funds trading for liquidity or mandate reasons rather than 10-20 day alpha
data_requirements: ["turnover_rate","ai_infra universe tags","beta-hedged sleeve attribution vs 000300.SH and 399006.SZ","rolling corr vs kshadow_5","sleeve drawdown and residual risk attribution","filings/PRs/transcripts only if attaching supplier/order narrative"]
failure_mode: Fails in policy-shock or speculative chase regimes where bursty turnover is genuinely informative, or when smooth turnover change is just illiquidity/neglect rather than accumulation.
supply_chain_hypothesis: Validated CN semicap, packaging, and test bottleneck names should show smoother weekly turnover-change paths than downstream narrative chasers while institutions accumulate ahead of source-reviewed order/backlog evidence.

name: amount_stability_ratio_20
mispricing_source: T+1 liquidity constraints force patient accumulation in scarce AI-infra names, and the market underreacts to that steady sponsorship until later fundamental confirmation.
forced_counterparty: Short-horizon retail momentum traders and benchmark-constrained holders rotating out of quiet consolidations.
data_requirements: ["beta-hedged sleeve return","residual return attribution","corr vs existing sleeves","sleeve drawdown","AI-universe source-review status","filings/press releases if mapping winners to specific optical/CPO relationships"]
failure_mode: It stops working when rumor-driven speculative rotations or broad deleveraging make unstable high-churn names outperform steady institutional sponsorship.
supply_chain_hypothesis: Stable amount accumulation may be front-running optical/fiber interconnect order visibility for AI datacenter buildouts.

name: float_value_absorption_20
mispricing_source: Slow recognition of AI capex/order transmission into lower-multiple infra names; cross-sectional valuation anchoring delays repricing even after steady capital absorption starts.
forced_counterparty: Benchmarked growth managers structurally underweight lower-PS hardware/infra names until revenue proof prints, while retail capital prefers higher-story, already-expensive theme names.
data_requirements: ["daily amount","circ_market_cap","ps_ttm","canonical ai_infra universe membership","beta-hedged sleeve attribution vs 000300.SH/399006.SZ"]
failure_mode: It stops working when high float-adjusted amount is distribution rather than accumulation, or when speculative high-PS momentum dominates fundamental rerating.
supply_chain_hypothesis: none

name: weekly_log_amount_stability_20
mispricing_source: Patient accumulation in bottleneck AI-infra names is gradual, but A-share attention is dominated by short-horizon headline and spike chasing, so smooth value-flow gets underpriced until trend confirmation arrives.
forced_counterparty: short-horizon retail spike-chasers and benchmark-aware managers who only add after obvious breakouts
data_requirements: ["daily OHLCV+amount for canonical CN AI universe","ai_infra source-review status for ranked names","beta-hedged sleeve attribution vs 000300.SH and 399006.SZ","correlation check vs kshadow_5 and amount-stability family"]
failure_mode: Fails in rumor-squeeze or macro deleveraging regimes where gap moves and forced liquidity dominate, so smooth flow no longer signals informed accumulation.
supply_chain_hypothesis: Steady weekly value-flow can surface datacenter, interconnect, and power bottleneck names being accumulated before AI capex/order evidence is fully confirmed in filings or official releases.

name: quiet_amount_spikefree_compress_20_60
mispricing_source: Underreaction to quiet institutional accumulation; the market over-rewards noisy turnover bursts and underprices stable float absorption in bottleneck names.
forced_counterparty: Retail breakout chasers and benchmarked funds that wait for explicit news, orders, or earnings confirmation before adding.
data_requirements: ["current daily amount and turnover_rate are sufficient for IS test","before promotion: corr vs amount_stability_20 and turnover_stability_20","beta-hedged sleeve attribution vs 000300.SH and 399006.SZ","residual risk and drawdown by AI universe sub-pool"]
failure_mode: Fails in policy-beta or retail-chasing regimes where turnover spikes carry true information, or in liquidity droughts where compressed amount reflects illiquidity rather than accumulation.
supply_chain_hypothesis: Candidate AI-infra bottleneck suppliers are being accumulated before verified order/backlog evidence is visible in filings or official releases.
